description: Timewear from giordano has an elegant contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A piece designed for modern life yet remaining true to its heritage and roots.Case diameter: 36 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 1 YearStainless steel caseBlack leather strap with a tang claspWhite dial with branding at the 12 hour markScrew to reset timeMetallic hands and roman numerals for time indicationSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 10 metresWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
